titleStmt.title: SII 15.60: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 60. (B.K. No. 40 of 1926-27.) LAKKUṆḌI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On two beams in the Chandramauḷīśvara temple.
This is dated the third regnal year of the king, Krōdhi, Pushya śu. 5, Monday, Uttarāyaṇa-Saṁkrānti, If śu 5 is a mistake for ba 5, then the date corresponds to 1184 A.D., December 24, Monday, °04.

It records a gift of money made by Basavarasa Siddhayya for the benefit of the god Ayistara Kēśavāditya. Basavarasa Siddhayya was the son-in-law of Dhannugi Daṇḍanātha and is described as the dear son of the one thousand Mahājanas of Lokkiguṇḍi and Taḷabhōgada-kēṇikaṟa. Lokkiguṇḍi is mentioned as a great agrahāra created by Śrī Rāma. A large number of gifts made to the same temple by several persons are also recorded.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmaccāḷukyapratāpacakrava¨rtti tribhuvanamalla vīrasōmēśvaradēvavijaya rājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhaprava¨rddhamānamācaṁdratāraṁbaraṁ(baraṁ) saluttamira © svasti yamaniyama svādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇa mōnānuṣṭhāṇa japasamādhi śīlaguṇa saṁvanna ¨rssaptasōmasaṁsthāvabhṛtāvagāhanapavitrīkṛtaśarīraruṁ catu¨rvvēdapāragaraṣṭādaśa dha¨rmmaśāstrakuśaḷarēkavākyaracaḷitadhai¨ryyasthai
¨ryyaparākramarāśritajanakalpavrikṣarahitapakṣakṣaya¨rkkaliyugagāṁgēya¨rpparamōpakāri gaḷuṁ paranārēdūraruṁ grāmanāmōttava¨rdduṣṭavidhvaṁsaka¨rvviśiṣṭajanāśraya¨rkkā makrōdhalōbhamōhaviva¨rjjita¨rśśaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjara¨rssamastaguṇaviśēṣōnnatarappa śrī rāmaradatti mahāgrahāra śrīmallokkiguṁḍiyūroḍeya pramu
kha śrī [sāsi¨rvvaru] naradu dha¨rmmaṁgaḷaṁ surakṣitamāgi rakṣisuttamira . kaṁda . hariṇāṁka naṁte kuvaḷayavaramitra¨rssarasiyaṁte kamaḷākararīśvaranaṁte śaktiyukta¨rddhareyoḷu sāsi¨rvvaranavaranē vaṁṇipudō . Intu negaḷtevetta śrīsāsi¨rvvara priyaputrarappa karavakka taḷabhōgada kēṇikāṟaṁ basavarasa siddhayyaṁgaḷa guṇamahimeyeṁteṁdaḍa . vṟitta . ©
© pusigeḍeyogadoḷnuḍi pavitramenippa caritramoḷpuvettasava guṇaṁ samabhyudayamaṁ taḷedū¨rjjita lakṣmi mattemeṇḍasegamaḷaṁkagoṁḍa jasameṁbivanā¨rjisidaṁ niraṁtaraṁ basavaṇa nāyaka sujanasaṁkuḷamastakavastunāyaka . Ātatakī¨rttiyeṁdu paripū¨rṇnaguṇōdaya neṁdu hṛtsamudbhāsurarūpaneṁdu budhabāndhavarakṣakaneṁdu satkaḷānvitavivēkaneṁdu pogaḷguṁ neradhannugidaṁḍanāthajāmātṛvanaḷkaṟiṁ negaḷda siddhugi dēvananē jagajjanaṁ . Iṁtu sakaḷaguṇakke nele
yoda taḷabhōgada kēṇikāṟa basavarasa siddhayyaṁgaḷu śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvava¨rṣada 3 neya krōdhi saṁvatsarada pusya suddha paṁcami sōmavāra Uttarāyaṇa saṁkramāṇa byatīpātadaṁdayistara kēsavādityadēvara naṁdādēvigagācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluvaṁ tāgi taṁma taḷabhōgada sthaḷadalu biṭṭa paṇa �taḷabhōgada hiriya sēnabhōgaṁ kaḷala kandara vāmarasaru biṭṭa paṇa 1 potthagrāhakaṁ basavarasanaḷiya mallayya biṭṭa haṇa 1 mattavā
bhattahaṭṭiya sthaḷadaluṁ naḍeva kēsavadēva nāgaṁṇanintivaru biṭṭa paṇa 1 bhavaṇigeya sthaḷakke naḍeva sēnabhōga lakkharasamallayyaṁgaḷu biṭṭa paṇa 1 nellakaṭṭeyalliyuṁ naḍeva boppa dēvanāyakaruṁ māciseṭṭiyaruṁ biṭṭa haṇa 1 Eleya sodeya sthaḷakke naḍeva sēna bōva mādhavadēva sōmayyaṁgaḷu biṭṭa paṇa 1 voṁde vaṇakke naḍeva sēnabōva sōmayyanāgadēvariṁti¨rvvaruṁ biṭṭa paṇa 1 nālkuṁ hebbāgilaluṁ taḷabhōgada dasayiṁ naḍeva kōlukāṟaru biṭṭa haṇa 1 pēṇṭheya kēriyalu naḍevaṁta
ha kōlukāṟari¨rvvaruṁ biṭṭa vīsa 10 dēvara vīḷayakke biṭṭele 200 dīpāvaḷiya ha¨rvvadalu dēvara bhōgakke biṭṭa meṇasu baḷḷa yeraḍu kārapuṁṇamiyalu dēva¨rgge habbakkeṁdu biṭṭabella 20 byavahāri saṁkaṁṇanā sōvaṁṇa meḷasina koḷagada sivaṁṇagaḷiṁtī mūvaru biṭṭa ma 1 . kōla kēṇikāṟaṁ Ācayyaṁ kōla kēṇiyalu biṭṭa ma 1 koḍeya vīsavaṁ nōḍuva hoṁnavara bācarasa miṁḍara sōvaṇnaniṁtivaru dhūpakke biṭṭa haṇa 1 Avara kōlukāṟa basavaṁṇa koṭṭa hāga 1 .
© mattavā puṇyadinadalu karavaḍada kēṇikāṟaṁ basavarasa siddhayyaṁgaḷatiśayadha¨rmmamanassaruṁ purassararāgi śrī kēśavādityadēvaraṁgabhōgavācaṁdratāraṁbaraṁ naḍevaṁtāgi taṁma karavaḍada kēṇiyalu biṭṭa paṇa 5 Ā hiriya sēnabōva kaḷalakandara vāmarasa dhūpakke biṭṭa paṇa 1 mattavā potthagrāhaka vatsarasa biṭṭa ma 1 karavaḍada bhramāṁtukakke naḍeva nāgarasa biṭṭa ma 1 Ā pāṁḍavara baṁmadēva biṭṭa ma 1 Ā kōlukāṟa nāraṇadēva dāmayyaniṁtivaru biṭṭa paṇa 1
yiṁtī sāsanamā¨rggadindārādaḍaṁ taḷabhōgakaravaḍadiṁ koṁḍa kēṇikāṟaru taṁtaṁma dha¨rmmaṁgaḷāgācaṁdratāraṁbaraṁ naḍavantāgi naḍasuva¨rnnaḍasidava¨rgge gaṁge gaye vāraṇāsi yalu sahaśra kavileyaṁ sahasra vēdavidarāgi¨rdda brāhmaṇa¨rggitta phalavakku yillā Ā tī¨rtthaṁgaḷalā kavileymaṁ sahaśra vēdapāraga brāhmaṇaraṁ hiṁse māḍidātanakku . kōṭi payaṁ kapileyanekkōṭi tapōdhanara vēdavidaraṁ panni¨rkkōṭiyane kōṭitī¨rtthada kōṭi mahādinadoḷaḷidanintidanaḷidaṁ . maṁgaḷaṁ . ©
Digital edition of SII 15.60 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
